benefits.description: Found higher dose testosterone calmed him down, head is clear, calmest he's been in his life
Higher testosterone dose eliminated fatigue that was present at lower doses

side_effects.description: Slim to no side effects after 8-10 weeks at higher dose

protocol_notes: Also taking testosterone 250mg x2/wk (not a peptide but part of stated protocol). Lower dose of 125mg/wk caused more brain fog and irritability compared to 500mg/wk. Previous experience at 250mg/wk. Notes that effect may also be age-related acceptance rather than purely pharmacological.
